raw_response_text:
<features>
- Large, wide petals
- Petals are light pink/white
- Central cluster of stamens/pistils is visible
- Petal shape is somewhat oval or elongated
</features>
<kb>
- IF flower has large, wide petals (often pink or purple) and a prominent central cluster of stamens, THEN class 81
- IF flower has yellow petals with a distinct structure and long, blade-like leaves in the background, THEN class 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows large, wide, light pink petals with a central cluster of stamens, which matches the visual pattern of class 81. It does not match the yellow color or structure of class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- yellow flower petals
- petals have a distinct shape with some curving downwards
- thin, vertical green leaves in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF flower has large, flat, multi-colored (pink/white) petals with a central cluster of stamens THEN class 81
- IF flower has yellow petals with a specific structure (upright center and drooping sides) THEN class 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a yellow flower with petals that curve downwards and an upright center, which matches the visual pattern of class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
